title: Support repeat concatenation nets in module inout port connections

features.name: repeat concatenation in module port connection
features.description: Code should include a repeat concatenation expression used as an argument when instantiating a module, where the target port is an inout wire
features.snippet:
module net_connect #(parameter WIDTH=1) (w, w); inout wire[WIDTH-1:0] w; endmodule
module ReplicateMod (inout wire [3:0] bus, inout wire [7:0] replicated); net_connect #(.WIDTH(8)) net_connect (replicated, ({2{bus}})); endmodule
